patch:
From c4c150f679a4f86143c877c3efd900a0f20819d8 Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
From: Dominic Ruggiero <dominic@userexe.me>
Date: Fri, 11 Nov 2022 20:31:44 -0500
Subject: [PATCH] conda env remove

---
 src/conda.ts | 15 ++++++++++++++-
 1 file changed, 14 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/src/conda.ts b/src/conda.ts
index 94f8e8f86a9e..d65bf0ede862 100644
--- a/src/conda.ts
+++ b/src/conda.ts
@@ -1228,7 +1228,20 @@ const completionSpec: Fig.Spec = {
       name: "env",
       description: "",
       args: {},
-      subcommands: [{ name: "list" }],
+      subcommands: [
+        { name: "list" },
+        {
+          name: "remove",
+          options: [
+            {
+              name: "-n",
+              args: {
+                name: "environment variable",
+              },
+            },
+          ],
+        },
+      ],
     },
     {
       name: "index",
